name: morevibe
description: A reusable LLM harness for vibe coding that separates sources, canon, and wiki layers across any project.

interface.shortDescription: A reusable harness for better vibe coding.
interface.longDescription: MoreVibe helps LLM agents maintain project knowledge with separate sources, canon, and wiki layers so context compounds cleanly across sessions and across different kinds of projects.
defaultPrompt: Set up MoreVibe for this project.
Ingest these materials into sources, canon, and wiki.
Lint MoreVibe for drift, overlap, and stale memory.
